headline: Palantir Ukraine AI Deal Puts Battlefield Data At Center Of Growth Narrative
summary: Palantir Technologies (NasdaqGS:PLTR) has expanded its cooperation with Ukraine to broaden the use of artificial intelligence across military and civilian defense operations. CEO Alex Karp met with President Volodymyr Zelenskyy to advance AI collaboration, including the Brave1 Dataroom project for battlefield AI model training. The partnership aims to deepen integration of AI driven intelligence into Ukrainian military planning and wider defense infrastructure. Palantir, trading at around...

headline: Even Dividend Stocks Are Beating Palantir Now. Still Worth Buying?
summary: Palantir (NASDAQ:PLTR) trades at $137.80, with the stock going sideways while almost everything else rallied, and that divergence frames the setup from here.
